title: feat: add replicate provider + seedance 2.0 video model
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Seedance 2.0 joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've wired up Replicate as a new provider, bringing ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 video model to the API. Whether you're turning text into motion or interpolating between frames, your video generation just got a major upgrade.
gist.summary: Integrated Replicate as a new provider and added the Seedance 2.0 video model with support for text-to-video, image-to-video, and frame interpolation.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate high-quality 720p videos using the Seedance 2.0 model directly through the API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a film director, filming a dancing pixel flower with a retro camera, while the Monitor Robot displays the video output. Represents the new video model (Seedance) and the addition of a new provider.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, filming a dancing pixel flower with a retro camera. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby, its screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) displaying the video playback. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, filming a dancing pixel flower with a retro camera. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby, its screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) displaying the video playback. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background.
